race.description: Kloses Supermarket Queen Of The Hills Hcp
race.comment: FLOREY (5) is a mare in form and finds another suitable assignment. She's been kept fresh with a month between runs and the blinkers go on for the first time, which should have her that touch sharper from the inside alley. With the key booking of Toeroek, she's the one they have to beat. TOSEN WATER (2) warmed into it nicely late when finishing right on the winner's heels first-up, and he's sure to have tightened up from that. He'll relish rising to this trip and should be blending in beautifully at the top of the straight. BROWN NOSE DAY GAL (8) continues to step up to the mark. She was no match for the impressive Cash last week, but that was some win. She draws well, gets in light, and will be in this for a long way. NICISH (4) has attacked the line in both runs back and should be at her top now. Is yet to prove herself at this trip, but her splits suggest she'll appreciate the extra ground. MYSTIC WONDER (9) was a sharp improver second-up and is open to further. Live hope on best.
